name: Salesforce
description: Salesforce is the world's leading CRM platform. Manage accounts, contacts, leads, opportunities, and cases with extensive customization, automation, and reporting through the REST API.

capabilities.name: query_records
capabilities.description: Execute a SOQL query to search and retrieve records from any Salesforce object.

capabilities.name: create_record
capabilities.description: Create a new record in any standard or custom Salesforce object.

capabilities.name: update_record
capabilities.description: Update fields on an existing Salesforce record.

capabilities.name: get_record
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific record by ID with selected fields.

capabilities.name: describe_object
capabilities.description: Get metadata describing a Salesforce object's fields, relationships, and properties.

capabilities.name: search_records
capabilities.description: Execute a SOSL full-text search across multiple objects.
